meta.title: Umukino wa buri munsi
meta.description: Tekereza ijambo ryihishe muri 6 rigerageza (cyangwa rike). Igikurushwa gishya kiraboneka buri munsi!
meta.keywords: Ikinyarwanda, puzzle, ijambo, gukina, umukino, kumurongo, tekereza, buri munsi

unlimited.title: Play unlimited — no waiting
unlimited.description: Play unlimited Wordle in Kinyarwanda. No waiting — get a new word every time.

speed.title: Speed Streak — race the clock
speed.description: Speed Streak: solve as many Wordle words in Kinyarwanda as you can in 5 minutes.

dordle.title: Dordle — 2 boards at once
dordle.description: Play Dordle in Kinyarwanda. Solve 2 Wordle boards at once with 7 guesses.

tridle.title: Tridle — 3 boards at once
tridle.description: Play Tridle in Kinyarwanda. Solve 3 Wordle boards at once with 8 guesses.

quordle.title: Quordle — 4 boards at once
quordle.description: Play Quordle in Kinyarwanda. Solve 4 Wordle boards at once with 9 guesses.

octordle.title: Octordle — 8 boards at once
octordle.description: Play Octordle in Kinyarwanda. Solve 8 Wordle boards at once with 13 guesses.

sedecordle.title: Sedecordle — 16 boards at once
sedecordle.description: Play Sedecordle in Kinyarwanda. Solve 16 Wordle boards at once with 21 guesses.

duotrigordle.title: Duotrigordle — 32 boards at once
duotrigordle.description: Play Duotrigordle in Kinyarwanda. Solve 32 Wordle boards at once with 37 guesses.

text.share_challenge_win: Nasobanukiye Wordle y'uyu munsi mu bigerageza {n}. Urashobora kundusha?
text.share_challenge_lose: Sinashobotse gusobanukirwa Wordle y'uyu munsi. Urashobora?
text.hard_mode_position: Hard mode: {letter} must be in position {position}

help.title: Uko bakina
help.text_1_2: Buri wese akeka agomba kuba ijambo ryamagambo atanu yemewe. Kanda buto yinjira kugirango utange igitekerezo cyawe.
help.text_1_3: Nyuma yo gukeka, amabati azahindura ibara kugirango yerekane inyuguti zijambo ryawe ariko cyangwa hafi yayo.
help.text_2_1: iri mu Ijambo kandi ahantu heza!
help.text_2_2: iri mu Ijambo, ariko ntabwo iri ahantu heza.
help.text_2_3: ntabwo ahari mu Ijambo ugerageza gukeka.
help.speed_explanation: You start with 5 minutes on the clock. Solve words to earn bonus time. Miss a word and you lose 30 seconds.
help.speed_scoring_explanation: Points = (7 − guesses) × 100 × combo multiplier. Consecutive solves build your combo up to 3x. A failed word resets your combo.
help.speed_pressure_explanation: Every 3 words solved, the timer speeds up. The longer you survive, the harder it gets.

seo.play_in_languages_sub: Buri rurimi ni ubuntu. Nta konti isabwa.
seo.footer: wordle.global — umukino w'amagambo wa buri munsi mu ndimi zirenga 80 ku buntu
seo.tile_correct: iri mu ijambo kandi ahantu heza.
seo.tile_semicorrect: iri mu ijambo ariko si ahantu heza.
seo.tile_incorrect: ntabwo iri mu ijambo na gato.

value_props.title: Indimi zirenga 80
value_props.desc: Kuva mu Cyarabu kugera mu Yoruba. Wordle nini y'indimi nyinshi.

value_props.title: Ibisobanuro by'amagambo
value_props.desc: Menya icyo ijambo risobanura nyuma yo gukina. Wongere ubumenyi bw'amagambo.

value_props.title: Ubugeni bwihariye bw'amagambo
value_props.desc: Buri jambo riza n'ishusho yihariye. Koranya yose.

value_props.title: Uburyo bwijimye n'insanganyamatsiko
value_props.desc: Uburyo bwiza, bwijimye, n'ibara bisobanutse ku bukina bushimishije.

value_props.title: Ikora ahantu hose
value_props.desc: PWA — shyiramo ku cyuma icyo ari cyo cyose. Ikora nta interineti. Nta gudownload bisabwa.

value_props.title: Ubuntu buhoraho
value_props.desc: Nta konti isabwa. Nta kwishyura. Kina gusa.

tips.title: Tangira n'ijambo ryuzuyemo indimi
tips.text: Amagambo nka CRANE, STARE cyangwa ADIEU agerageza inyuguti zikunze gukora vuba. Kumenya indimi ziri muri ryo bigabanya amahitamo byihuse.

tips.title: Koresha ibyo uzi
tips.text: Inyuguti z'icyatsi ziraguma. Iz'umuhondo zigomba kwimuka. Iz'umukara zarakuweho. Buri gigeragezo kigomba gukoresha ibimenyetso byose bitatu.

tips.title: Tekereza ku miterere isanzwe
tips.text: Amagambo y'Icyongereza akunze kurangira kuri -TION, -IGHT, -OUND, -MENT. Izindi ndimi zifite imiterere yazo — zige.

tips.title: Kuraho, ntukeke ku bwumvikane
tips.text: Ijambo ryawe rya kabiri rigomba kugerageza inyuguti nshya, ntirisubiremo izemejwe. Gerageza consonanti nyinshi zitarageragezwa.

tips.title: Witondere inyuguti zisubirwamo
tips.text: Amagambo nka CREEK, FLOSS cyangwa APPLE ni imitego isanzwe. Ibimenyetso byawe ntibihura, tekereza inyuguti isubirwamo.

tips.title: Koresha uburyo bugoye kugira ngo ukore neza
tips.text: Uburyo bugoye bukugoboka gukoresha ibimenyetso byemejwe muri buri gigeragezo. Bikubakira ingeso nziza.

tips_speed.title: Tangira na CRANE cyangwa STARE
tips_speed.text: Inyuguti zikunze gukora ziguha amahirwe meza yo gusobanukirwa vuba. Buri segonda ni ngombwa.

tips_speed.title: Ntutinde utekereza
tips_speed.text: Speed Streak ishimira umutima utekanye. Ubonye ijambo rishoboka, rigerageze — bonus ya combo iruta gusobanukirwa neza rwose.

tips_speed.title: Rinda combo yawe
tips_speed.text: Ijambo rinanijwe rivuna multiplier yawe. Udashize neza, koresha gigeragezo gifite umutekano kugira ngo ubone ibimenyetso byinshi.

tips_speed.title: Gerageza gusobanukirwa mu bigeragezo 2-3
tips_speed.text: Bonus y'igihe ni nini ku gusobanukirwa vuba (+60s ku gigeragezo 1, +30s ku 2). Igigeragezo cya kabiri gifite ingaruka gishobora gutanga byinshi.

tips_speed.title: Iga uko amagambo arangira bisanzwe
tips_speed.text: Imiterere nka -IGHT, -OUND, -ATCH igaruka kenshi. Kuyimenya vuba gukiza amasegonda ku ijambo.

tips_speed.title: Tuza umutima igihe igitutu giyongera
tips_speed.text: Timer ibyara vuba buri magambo 3. Kwihutira bituma ukora amakosa. Amajwi asanzwe atsinda ubwoba.

tips_multiboard.title: Tangira mu buryo bwagutse
tips_multiboard.text: Koresha amagambo afite inyuguti zikunze (CRANE, STARE) kugira ngo ubone ibimenyetso ku mbaho zose icyarimwe.

tips_multiboard.title: Reba clavier igabanyije
tips_multiboard.text: Clavier yerekana amabara ku buri bwato. Inyuguti y'icyatsi ku bwato bumwe n'umukara ku bundi bigabanya amahitamo vuba.

tips_multiboard.title: Ha agaciro imbaho zigoranye
tips_multiboard.text: Shyira ibigeragezo ku bwato bufite ibitazwi byinshi. Imbaho zoroshye zikunze kwisoza.

tips_multiboard.title: Ntusesagure ibigeragezo bya mbere
tips_multiboard.text: Koresha ibigeragezo 2-3 bya mbere ku magambo atanga amakuru menshi mbere yo kwerekeza ku bwato runaka.

tips_multiboard.title: Shakisha inyuguti zisangiwe
tips_multiboard.text: Imbaho ebyiri zerekana E y'umuhondo, ijambo rifite E ahantu hashya rifasha imbaho zombi icyarimwe.

tips_multiboard.title: Bika igigeragezo ku mpanuka
tips_multiboard.text: Uhagaritswe ku bwato bwa nyuma, kugira igigeragezo gisigaye ni itandukaniro iri hagati yo gutsinda no gutsindwa.

seo.mode_desc_classic: Ufite ibigeragezo 6 kugira ngo utegereze ijambo ry'inyuguti 5 ryihishe. Koresha ibimenyetso by'amabara kugira ngo ugere ku gisubizo.
seo.mode_desc_unlimited: Ufite ibigeragezo 6 kugira ngo utegereze ijambo ry'inyuguti 5 ryihishe. Koresha ibimenyetso by'amabara. Nyuma ya buri mukino, kanda "Kongera gukina" kugira ngo ubone ijambo rishya ako kanya — nta limite ya buri munsi.
seo.mode_desc_speed: Tangira ufite iminota 3 ku isaha. Buri jambo usobanukiwe ritanga igihe gisumba — sobanuka mu bigeragezo bike kugira ngo ubone bonus nini (+60s ku gigeragezo 1, +10s ku 6). Amagambo unanijwe agutwara amasegonda 30. Kubaka combo usobanuka amagambo akurikirana kugeza kuri multiplier 3x. Igitutu giyongera — timer ibyara vuba buri magambo 3.
seo.mode_desc_multiboard: {modeName} igusaba gusobanukirwa n'imbaho {boardCount} za Wordle icyarimwe ukoresheje ibigeragezo {maxGuesses} gusa. Buri gigeragezo kigaragara ku mbaho zose zitarashobotswe. Imbaho zishobowe zirahagarara. Clavier y'amabara agabanyije yerekana inyuguti zikwiye ku mbaho izi n'izi. Tangira n'amagambo y'inyuguti zikunze kugira ngo ubone ibimenyetso ku mbaho zose icyarimwe.

faq.a: Sura wordle.global/{lang} kugira ngo ukine Wordle ya buri munsi mu {langName}. Ufite ibigeragezo 6 kugira ngo utegereze ijambo ry'inyuguti 5. Nyuma ya buri gigeragezo, tiles zihindura icyatsi (inyuguti nziza, ahantu heza), umuhondo (inyuguti nziza, ahantu hatari ho), cyangwa umukara (inyuguti itari mu ijambo).
Yego. Ijambo rishya rihitamo buri munsi. Abantu bose bakina mu rurimi rumwe babona ijambo rimwe, kandi urashobora kugereranya ibisubizo n'inshuti zawe.
Yego. Igikurushwa cya buri munsi, uburyo butagira imipaka, n'uburyo bwose bwo gukina ni ubuntu rwose mu ndimi zirenga 80. Nta konti cyangwa gudownload bisabwa.

faq.q: Nshobora gukina inshuro zirenze imwe ku munsi?
faq.a: Yego — gerageza uburyo butagira imipaka kuri wordle.global/{lang}/unlimited kugira ngo ukine imikino itagira iherezo. Gutsindira kwawe kwa buri munsi gukurikiranwa ukwako.

unlimited.q: Wordle Butagira imipaka ni iki mu {langName}?
unlimited.a: Wordle Butagira imipaka ikwemerera gukina imikino myinshi uko ushaka mu {langName}, utaretse igikurushwa cy'ejo. Buri mukino uguha ijambo rishya ryo gukeka mu bigeragezo 6.
Yego. Wordle Butagira imipaka ni ubuntu rwose. Nta konti, nta gudownload, nta panose mu gihe cyo gukina.

unlimited.q: Uburyo butagira imipaka bubarwa mu gutsindira kwa buri munsi?
unlimited.a: Oya. Uburyo butagira imipaka bufite imibare yabwo yihariye. Gutsindira kwawe kwa buri munsi kugira ingaruka n'igikurushwa cya buri munsi gusa.
Nta limite. Urashobora gukina inshuro nyinshi uko ushaka. Nyuma ya buri mukino, kanda "Kongera gukina" kugira ngo ubone ijambo rishya ako kanya.

unlimited.q: Ni mu ndimi izihe nshobora gukina Wordle Butagira imipaka?
unlimited.a: Wordle Butagira imipaka iraboneka mu ndimi zirenga 80 kuri wordle.global, harimo Icyongereza, Icyesipanyoli, Ikidage, Igifinlandaise, Icyarabu, Igifaransa, Igitaliyani, Igiporutugali, n'izindi nyinshi.

speed.a: Speed Streak ni uburyo bwa Wordle bufite igihe mu {langName}. Utangira ufite iminota 3 kandi usobanuka amagambo menshi uko ushoboye. Sobanuka vuba kugira ngo ubone igihe gisumba.
Ubona amanota ku buri jambo usobanukiwe. Ibigeragezo bike n'ukusobanuka vuba bitanga amanota menshi. Kubaka combo usobanuka amagambo akurikirana — kugeza kuri multiplier 3x.
Umukino urarangira kandi ubona amanota yawe ya nyuma, amagambo yose wasobanukiwe, combo nini, n'igipimo cy'ibigeragezo. Urashobora kongera gukina ako kanya.
Yego. Speed Streak ni ubuntu rwose mu ndimi zose zirenga 80. Nta konti cyangwa gudownload bisabwa.

multiboard.a: {modeName} ni ubwoko bwa Wordle bufite imbaho nyinshi mu {langName}. Usobanuka imbaho {boardCount} za Wordle icyarimwe ukoresheje ibigeragezo {maxGuesses}. Buri gigeragezo kigaragara ku mbaho zose zitarashobotswe.
Ubona ibigeragezo {maxGuesses} kugira ngo usobanuke imbaho zose {boardCount}. Imbaho ishobotswe irahagarara kandi urashobora kwibanda ku zisigaye.

multiboard.q: Ni iyihe ngamba ikora neza muri {modeName}?
multiboard.a: Tangira n'amagambo y'inyuguti zikunze kugira ngo ubone amakuru ku mbaho zose {boardCount} icyarimwe. Reba clavier y'amabara agabanyije — yerekana inyuguti zikwiye ku mbaho izi n'izi.
Yego. {modeName} ni ubuntu rwose mu ndimi zose zirenga 80. Nta konti cyangwa gudownload bisabwa. Kina inshuro nyinshi uko ushaka.

howto.name: Andika ijambo
howto.text: Andika ijambo ry'inyuguti 5 ryemewe mu {langName} ukoresheje clavier ya ecran cyangwa clavier yawe, hanyuma ukande Enter.

howto.name: Soma ibimenyetso
howto.text: Tiles z'icyatsi bisobanura inyuguti ikwiye kandi iri ahantu heza. Umuhondo bisobanura inyuguti iri mu ijambo ariko ahantu hatari ho. Umukara bisobanura inyuguti itari mu ijambo.

howto.name: Sobanuka mu bigeragezo 6
howto.text: Koresha ibimenyetso by'amabara kugira ngo ugere ku ijambo. Ufite ibigeragezo 6 muri byose. Nyuma y'igikurushwa, reba imibare yawe kandi usangire igisubizo cyawe.

unlimited.name: Tangira umukino
unlimited.text: Sura wordle.global/{lang}/unlimited kugira ngo utangire gukina Wordle Butagira imipaka mu {langName}. Ijambo ry'inyuguti 5 rihitamwa.

unlimited.name: Keka ijambo
unlimited.text: Andika ijambo ry'inyuguti 5 ryemewe hanyuma ukande Enter. Tiles z'icyatsi ni inyuguti ikwiye ahantu heza. Umuhondo ni inyuguti iri mu ijambo ariko ahantu hatari ho. Umukara ni inyuguti itari mu ijambo.

unlimited.name: Kongera gukina ako kanya
unlimited.text: Nyuma yo gusobanuka (cyangwa gukoresha ibigeragezo 6 byose), kanda "Kongera gukina" kugira ngo ubone ijambo rishya. Nta gutegereza ejo.

speed.name: Tangira timer
speed.text: Sura wordle.global/{lang}/speed hanyuma ukande Tangira. Utangira ufite iminota 3.

speed.name: Sobanuka vuba
speed.text: Buri jambo usobanukiwe rituguha igihe gisumba (+10s kugeza +60s). Amagambo unanijwe agutwara amasegonda 30.

speed.name: Kubaka combo yawe
speed.text: Sobanuka amagambo akurikirana kugira ngo ubake combo multiplier (kugeza 3x). Combo ivunika nurenze ijambo. Gerageza gutsinda score yawe nini.

multiboard.name: Tangira umukino
multiboard.text: Sura wordle.global/{lang}/{modeName} kugira ngo ukine {modeName} mu {langName}. Imbaho {boardCount} zigaragara zifite amagambo atandukanye yihishe.

multiboard.name: Keka ku mbaho zose
multiboard.text: Andika ijambo ry'inyuguti 5 hanyuma ukande Enter. Igigeragezo cyawe kigaragara ku mbaho {boardCount} zose icyarimwe. Buri bwato bwerekana ibimenyetso byabwo (icyatsi, umuhondo, umukara).

multiboard.name: Sobanuka imbaho {boardCount} zose
multiboard.text: Imbaho zashobotswe zihagarara ahazima. Koresha clavier y'amabara agabanyije kugira ngo ukurikirane inyuguti zikora ku mbaho izi n'izi. Sobanuka imbaho {boardCount} zose mu bigeragezo {maxGuesses} kugira ngo utsinde.

ui.word_info_desc: Ibisobanuro n'ubugeni bwa AI nyuma y'umukino
ui.install_app_desc: Kina udafite interineti kandi ubone ikimenyetso
ui.play_more_languages: Kina indimi nyinshi kugirango ubone imibare rusange!
ui.play_daily_like_app: Kina Wordle buri munsi nka porogaramu
ui.no_games_yet: Ntabwo wakinye umukino. Hitamo ururimi kugirango utangire!
ui.easy_desc: Ijambo iryo ariryo ryose ryemewe, nubwo ridahari mu nkoranyamagambo
ui.normal_desc: Ibigeragezo bigomba kuba amagambo yemewe yo mu nkoranyamagambo
ui.hard_desc: Ibimenyetso byagaragajwe bigomba gukoreshwa mu bigeragezo bikurikira
ui.high_contrast_desc: Amabara yoroshye ku batazi gutandukanya amabara
ui.todays_word_reveal: Ijambo ry'uyu munsi — Kina kugirango urimenya!
ui.daily_words_counting: amagambo ya buri munsi kandi ariyongera
ui.difficulty_locked: Ntushobora guhindura ubukana nyuma yo gukeka
ui.streak_footer: Streak counts classic daily puzzles in any language. Play once a day to keep it going.
ui.mode_daily_desc: One word per day. 6 guesses. The classic.
ui.mode_unlimited_desc: Random words, no limit. Play as much as you want.
ui.mode_speed_desc: Race the clock. Solve as many words as you can before time runs out.
ui.mode_custom_desc: Pick a word, share a link. Challenge your friends.
ui.mode_party_desc: Play the same word with friends. See who solves it fastest.
ui.homepage_languages_counting: indimi kandi ziyongera — ziyongerwa buri gihe.
ui.homepage_and_more_desc: Octordle, Semantic Explorer, Custom Word, Party Mode — n'ibindi biri gutegerezwa.
